description: Sample EMTOM tasks for testing and development

tasks.title: Inverted Drawer - Retrieve the Kettle
tasks.story: In this strange kitchen, some furniture behaves unexpectedly. The drawers and cabinets seem to have a mind of their own...
tasks.public_goal: Retrieve the kettle and place it on the table so both agents can use it.
tasks.public_context: Some furniture in the kitchen behaves oddly. Agents should collaborate to get the kettle to the table.

agent_0: chest_of_drawers_54 behaves with inverse_state: the 'open' action produces the opposite effect.
To reveal contents, you must send the 'close' action.

agent_roles.agent_0: Informed explorer who discovered the furniture quirks.
agent_roles.agent_1: Unaware helper who does not know about the strange mechanics.

success_condition.description: Kettle is placed on the table.

tasks.title: Locked Chest - Find the Key
tasks.story: A mysterious chest sits in the corner of the room, firmly locked. The key must be hidden somewhere nearby...
tasks.public_goal: Find the key hidden in the drawer and use it to unlock the chest.
tasks.public_context: The chest is locked. Search the room for a key.

agent_0: The key is hidden in the drawer.
